scripts.build: pnpm -r run build && pnpm --filter koishi-plugin-bilibili-notify run build:client && node scripts/build-astrbot-sidecar.mjs && node scripts/build-astrbot-page.mjs
scripts.dev: pnpm -r --filter './packages/*' run build && pnpm -r --filter './packages/*' --filter '@bilibili-notify/server' --filter '@bilibili-notify/web' --parallel --stream run dev
scripts.build:apps: pnpm -r --filter './packages/*' run build && pnpm --filter @bilibili-notify/server --filter @bilibili-notify/web run build
scripts.dev:desktop: pnpm -r --filter './packages/*' run build && pnpm --filter @bilibili-notify/server --filter @bilibili-notify/web run build && pnpm --filter @bilibili-notify/desktop run dev
scripts.build:desktop: pnpm -r --filter './packages/*' run build && pnpm --filter @bilibili-notify/server --filter @bilibili-notify/web run build && pnpm --filter @bilibili-notify/desktop run tauri:build
scripts.lint:astrbot-python: uv run --no-project --directory astrbot/core --with ruff ruff check .
scripts.format:astrbot-python: uv run --no-project --directory astrbot/core --with ruff ruff format .
scripts.test:astrbot-python: PYTHONPATH=. uv run --no-project --directory astrbot/core --with httpx --with pytest --with pytest-asyncio pytest tests
scripts.check:astrbot-python: uv run --no-project --directory astrbot/core --with ruff ruff check . && uv run --no-project --directory astrbot/core --with ruff ruff format --check . && PYTHONPATH=. uv run --no-project --directory astrbot/core --with httpx --with pytest --with pytest-asyncio pytest tests
